index.title: New analysis
index.subtitle: Upload a start video → identify the gate drop → analysis generates the annotated video and the phases timeline.
index.audio_not_detected: Audio gate not detected — pick the frame manually.
index.gate_hint: Scrub to the moment the gate starts dropping, then click Mark.
index.audio_detected_msg: 🎯 Gate auto-detected (4 audio beeps) at frame {frame} (t = {t}s){bipExtra} Confirm or adjust if needed.

result.ephemeral_warning: ⚠️ This analysis is not saved — it will disappear at the next server restart. Assign an athlete to keep it.
result.anno_info: Click-drag = create · erase tool then click on annotation = delete
result.video_hint: Drag the scrubber to scan · ← → frame by frame · space = play/pause
result.adjust_gate_same: You're already on the current gate frame. Move the video and try again.
result.adjust_gate_confirm:
Replace gate drop with frame {frame} (t = {t}s)?

Phases and reaction times will be recalculated instantly.
result.confirm_unassign: Remove athlete? The analysis will become ephemeral and disappear at the next server restart.

compare.title: Comparison
compare.subtitle: Rider in cyan, reference in magenta (pro · other start of the athlete · other athlete). Scrub independently or via sync on the gate drop.
compare.panel_empty:
Pick a reference in the menu above:
pro · other start of the athlete · other athlete
compare.picker_empty_pros: No pro saved. Go to Pros to add one.
compare.picker_empty_same: No other start for this rider.
compare.sync_hint: Both videos aligned on gate drop (T=0). If you offset one video alone, the calibration is kept.
compare.angles_hint: Pick a pro, place both videos on the wanted frame, then click.
compare.angles_refresh: Click again after moving a video to refresh.
compare.anim_note: 4 "posture" anchors (re-aligned frame by frame): Hips / Feet / Shoulders / Hands. Free motion: alignment frozen at T=−0.5s, each rider moves from their set position (to see who lunges / rises first).
compare.angle_table_note: Angles update frame by frame. Space = play/pause, ←/→ = frame by frame when animation has focus.
compare.overlay_note: Pick which point we align between rider and reference: Hips = pure posture / Feet = body position on pedal / Shoulders = arm position on handlebar.
compare.radar_note: 6 joint angles radar (0 at center, 180° at edge). Lets you read the gap per joint regardless of position in space.
compare.trunk_note: Trunk: hip→shoulder angle vs vertical (+ = leaning forward). Ankle: toe-tip proxy.
compare.footer_select: Click a panel title = select it · Tab = switch panel

athletes.title: Athletes
athletes.subtitle: One folder per athlete: find all their analyzed videos in one place.
athletes.empty_state: No athlete yet. Create one to start tracking your riders.
athletes.detail_exclusion_hint_none: Check the ⊘ on the right of a session to exclude it from stats and the graph (useful for a missed start or analysis bug).
athletes.detail_exclusion_hint_some: session excluded from stats and graph. Toggle the ⊘ on the right of a row.
athletes.confirm_delete_athlete: Delete this folder? The analyzed videos will remain accessible but will no longer be linked to this athlete.

pros.title: Pros bank
pros.subtitle: Reference videos for side-by-side comparison. Upload a video, identify the gate drop, and the skeleton is generated.
pros.subtitle_form: Upload a video → identify the gate → skeleton is generated.
pros.confirm_delete_pro: Delete this pro? Saved comparisons will lose their reference.

pro_view.frame_hint: Drag the scrubber to scan · ← → frame by frame · space = play/pause

manual_reaction.title: Manual reaction measurement
manual_reaction.subtitle: You mark the gate drop and first movement frame by frame. Instant calculation, works without audio. UCI cadence = beep 1 at 360 ms before gate drop.
manual_reaction.instructions: Move to the gate-drop frame, click 'Mark gate'. Then move to the first movement frame, click 'Mark movement'. The reaction time appears.
manual_reaction.mark_hint: Scrub to the exact moment, then click the matching button. You can re-mark by going back. Shortcuts: ← / → for one frame, space play/pause, <kbd>G</kbd> for gate, <kbd>M</kbd> for movement.

tools_gear.title: Gear ratio (BMX race)
tools_gear.subtitle: Compute development for the chainring × sprocket combo. Reference: 20" rear wheel.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: App display settings.
settings.theme_note: Pick the interface look. The setting is saved locally and applied on every page.
settings.language_note: Pick the interface language. The choice is saved locally on this device.
settings.cleanup_note: Analyses without an assigned athlete are no longer kept across restarts. You can also force their removal now (videos + CSV on disk included). Irreversible.
settings.cleanup_detail: Files detected: uploaded + annotated videos + landmarks CSV + result JSON whose prefix no longer matches any job or pro.
settings.cleanup_confirm: Delete {jobs} analysis(es) + {files} file(s)? This action is irreversible.
